/opt/homebrew/opt/ccache/libexec/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX12.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/camera_pipe_process.dir/process.cpp.o -o camera_pipe_process  libcamera_pipe.a libcamera_pipe_auto_schedule.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libpng.dylib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX12.3.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libjpeg.dylib libcamera_pipe.runtime.a libcamera_pipe_auto_schedule.runtime.a
